title: Auto-Ignite
description: Auto Ignite is a mod that automatically ignites TNT and Creepers. Especially useful for practicing the Creeper PVP gamemode.
body:
# Auto-Ignite
- Automatically ignites TNT and Creepers when spawned
- Changes fuse time to 1 second
- Makes TNT "jump" upon being lit, replicating the behavior common on PVP servers

This mod was originally created for practicing the Creeper PVP gamemode.

This mod was created for use in single player.
